prompt: Please recreate the entire image in a crayon drawing style. Simplify the details so that it looks like it was drawn by a 10-year-old child. Do not use the original colors from the image. You can add adorable elements such as flowers, candies, stars, clouds, etc. to give it a childlike and innocent feel. 4:5
